title: andropogon zizanioides var. nigritanus
intro: Andropogon zizanioides var. nigritanus, also known as black lemongrass or East Indian lemongrass, is a variant of the Andropogon zizanioides plant, which is a type of grass native to Africa and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its essential oils, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Andropogon zizanioides var. nigritanus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of fever and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used as a natural remedy for various health issues.
